9d1c185 feat(e2e): create kiro subpackage with setup, testenv, and fixtures

44417db refactor(e2e): extract BuildAgent and RepoRoot into importable build.go
605ed09 refactor: rename skill files to match phase names and add frontmatter
d29659b refactor: remove plugin layer, use native auto-discovery for all AI tools
0c3a7ab docs: simplify install instructions and remove redundant clone steps
14ed796 fix: harden CLI against path traversal, shell injection, and loose permissions
3bf0166 refactor: deduplicate helpers and remove unnecessary work across kiro agent and e2e
bc926e4 docs: update READMEs and test-writer skill with shared E2E harness details

## Your task

Based on the above changes, create a single git commit.

You have the capability to call multiple tools in a single response. Stage and create the commit using a single message. Do not use any other tools or do anything else. Do not send any other text or messages besides these tool calls.

input.command: git add .claude/settings.json Makefile agents/entire-agent-kiro/internal/kiro/hooks.go e2e/entire.go e2e/fixtures.go e2e/go.mod e2e/go.sum e2e/lifecycle.go e2e/lifecycle_test.go e2e/testenv.go .claude/skills/e2e-debug/ docs/ e2e/README.md e2e/agents/ e2e/artifacts/ e2e/bootstrap/ e2e/entire/ e2e/testutil/
input.description: Stage all changed and untracked files

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
refactor(e2e): restructure into agent subpackages with shared test utilities

Move agent-specific tests into dedicated subpackages (e2e/kiro/, e2e/entire/),
extract shared helpers into e2e/testutil/ and e2e/bootstrap/, add e2e/artifacts/
and e2e/agents/ support, remove unused code (isEntireIDEHook, KiroTranscript,
NewKiroTestEnv/NewKiroGitEnv), add AGENT filter to Makefile targets, and add
testify dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Create commit with all staged changes
